entities.name: git-commit
entities.context: Git command used with --no-verify flag to bypass checks after review

relationships.context: Tool operates within Git workflow as pre-commit hook
Runs during pre-commit stage to block unsafe commits
Part of N5 system, located in N5/commands/ and N5/scripts/
Calls Python script for dry-run mode execution
Detects modifications to protected commands.jsonl files
Detects modifications to protected schema files
Detects modifications to protected Knowledge directory/files
Detects modifications to protected Lists directory/files
Can bypass git-check with --no-verify flag after manual review
